proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Polynomial, x2: Real) { Polynomial.constant(x0) != x1 or constant(x0, x2) = polynomial_function(x1, x2) }(c, Polynomial.constant(c), x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](c, x)
function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Real) { Polynomial.indeterminate != x0 or identity_fn(x1) = polynomial_function(x0, x1) }(Polynomial.indeterminate, x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](x)
let w0: Real satisfy { polynomial_function(-p, w0) != pointwise_neg(polynomial_function(p), w0) }
function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Polynomial, x2: Real) { -x0 != x1 or pointwise_neg(polynomial_function(x0), x2) = polynomial_function(x1, x2) }(p, -p, w0)
function[T0: lib(neg).Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Real, Real](polynomial_function(p), x)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { --x0 = x0 }[Real](polynomial_function(p, x))
function(x0: Real) { --x0 = x0 }(pointwise_neg(polynomial_function(p), x))
Real.neg = lib(real.real_base).neg
Real.neg = lib(real.real_base).neg
function(x0: Real) { pointwise_neg(polynomial_function(p), x0) = polynomial_function(-p, x0) }(x)
let w0: Real satisfy { polynomial_function(p + q, w0) != pointwise_add(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), w0) }

function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Polynomial, x2: Polynomial, x3: Real) { x0 + x1 != x2 or pointwise_add(polynomial_function(x0), polynomial_function(x1), x3) = polynomial_function(x2, x3) }(p, q, p + q, w0)

goal: pointwise_add(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x) = polynomial_function(p, x) + polynomial_function(q, x)
proof: function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[Real, Real](polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x)
Real.add = lib(real.real_base).add
Real.add = lib(real.real_base).add
function(x0: Real) { pointwise_add(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x0) = polynomial_function(p + q, x0) }(x)
pointwise_add(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x) != polynomial_function(p, x) + polynomial_function(q, x)
let w0: Real satisfy { polynomial_function(p * q, w0) != pointwise_mul(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), w0) }

function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Polynomial, x2: Polynomial, x3: Real) { x0 * x1 != x2 or pointwise_mul(polynomial_function(x0), polynomial_function(x1), x3) = polynomial_function(x2, x3) }(p, q, p * q, w0)

goal: pointwise_mul(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x) = polynomial_function(p, x) * polynomial_function(q, x)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](polynomial_function(p), x, polynomial_function(q))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x0 * x1 }(polynomial_function(p, x), polynomial_function(q, x))
function(x0: Real) { pointwise_mul(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x0) = polynomial_function(p * q, x0) }(x)
pointwise_mul(polynomial_function(p), polynomial_function(q), x) != polynomial_function(p, x) * polynomial_function(q, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Polynomial) { Polynomial.constant(x0) != x1 or Polynomial.constant(Real.0) = polynomial_derivative(x1) }(c, Polynomial.constant(c))
function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Polynomial) { -x0 != x1 or -polynomial_derivative(x0) = polynomial_derivative(x1) }(p, -p)
function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Polynomial, x2: Polynomial) { x0 + x1 != x2 or polynomial_derivative(x0) + polynomial_derivative(x1) = polynomial_derivative(x2) }(p, q, p + q)
function(x0: Polynomial, x1: Polynomial, x2: Polynomial) { x0 * x1 != x2 or x0 * polynomial_derivative(x1) + x1 * polynomial_derivative(x0) = polynomial_derivative(x2) }(p, q, p * q)
